channel.title: 2wheelsnoclue TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from 2wheelsnoclue

item.title: 5 Reasons I got a 300: 1)It’s my first road bike and I wasn’t interested in getting on power I wasn’t ready for. 2)I loved how light weight the bike is. 3) it was in my budget at the time of buying a bike… not eveyone is ready to drop $25k on a bike 4)
item.description: 5 Reasons I got a 300: 1)It’s my first road bike and I wasn’t interested in getting on power I wasn’t ready for. 2)I loved how light weight the bike is. 3) it was in my budget at the time of buying a bike… not eveyone is ready to drop $25k on a bike 4)
item.author: 2wheelsnoclue

item.title: It’s genuinely just coloured plastic there is absolutely NO tint. I have a Shoei one at home but that one isn’t red 👉👈 #biketok #bikecreator #bikelover #yamaha
item.description: It’s genuinely just coloured plastic there is absolutely NO tint. I have a Shoei one at home but that one isn’t red 👉👈 #biketok #bikecreator #bikelover #yamaha
item.author: 2wheelsnoclue

item.title: My best advice is to try ALOT of options on for yourself, buying gear online you haven’t used is risky you may not like it. Everyone is different,everyone likes different stuff. Sometimes I ride in full gear, sometimes I ride in my tshirt, jeans and conve
item.description: My best advice is to try ALOT of options on for yourself, buying gear online you haven’t used is risky you may not like it. Everyone is different,everyone likes different stuff. Sometimes I ride in full gear, sometimes I ride in my tshirt, jeans and conve
item.author: 2wheelsnoclue
